text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time once again for the annual summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm back and rarin' to go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What should we do first? Split some
watermelons? Shoot some fireworks? Or how
'bout a barbeque?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh—that ain't all, of course! Training's still top
priority!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll need some hardcore prep before I take on the
Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So c'mon, Trainer! Let's train our way to victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, summer camp kicks off.
